{{Quote|Excuse me, captain, but something strange is happening to Ova! The planet's vanishing!|A crew member of [[Captain Cautious]]'s [[Captain Cautious's freighter|freighter]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 23">[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]]</ref>}}
'''Ova''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that presumably was sucked into infinity by an [[Infinity Wave]] in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
